home.layout.description.message: Marshal is the Department of Repository Affairs — automated stewardship for projects that prefer paperwork to drama.
home.layout.description.description: Front page layout description (meta description for SEO)

home.hero.eyebrow.description: Front page hero eyebrow above the heading

home.hero.tagline.message: Marshal is the Department of Repository Affairs — automated stewardship for projects that prefer paperwork to drama. Every thread, every ticket, every access tier, handled in order.
home.hero.tagline.description: Front page hero tagline beneath the heading

home.hero.ctaLabel.description: Front page hero primary call-to-action button label

home.hero.secondaryCtaLabel.description: Front page hero secondary call-to-action button label

home.features.policies.title.description: Front page Features card title for Policies

home.features.policies.description.message: Write a YAML block describing how Marshal handles a class of events — stale threads, overdue PRs, support by tier. Marshal reads only what is filed and stamps only what is sealed.
home.features.policies.description.description: Front page Features card description for Policies

home.features.dockets.title.description: Front page Features card title for Dockets

home.features.dockets.description.message: Every action Marshal takes writes a line in the public record. Closed threads, stamped approvals, scheduled rollovers — all append-only, all visible, nothing retracted.
home.features.dockets.description.description: Front page Features card description for Dockets

home.features.accessTiers.title.description: Front page Features card title for Access Tiers

home.features.accessTiers.description.message: Route incoming work by sponsor, contributor, or public. The label is stamped, not negotiated. Every routing decision is filed in the docket.
home.features.accessTiers.description.description: Front page Features card description for Access Tiers

home.features.scheduledStewardship.title.description: Front page Features card title for Scheduled Stewardship

home.features.scheduledStewardship.descr.message: Run cleanups, audits, and rollovers on a cron. Marshal acts at the top of the hour, files a record, and moves on. Nothing waits for a human to remember.
home.features.scheduledStewardship.descr.description: Front page Features card description for Scheduled Stewardship

home.features.threadArchival.title.description: Front page Features card title for Thread Archival

home.features.threadArchival.description.message: Close and seal threads inactive for N days — with a paper trail for each. Every sealed thread carries the reason for archival and a path to reopen.
home.features.threadArchival.description.description: Front page Features card description for Thread Archival

home.features.automatedStamps.title.description: Front page Features card title for Automated Stamps

home.features.automatedStamps.descriptio.message: Marshal acts under a standing authorization. Every action carries a timestamp, an author of record, and a reference to the policy that triggered it.
home.features.automatedStamps.descriptio.description: Front page Features card description for Automated Stamps

home.stats.manualClosures.label.description: Front page Stats label for manual closures count

home.stats.policyFile.label.description: Front page Stats label for policy file count

home.stats.docketEntries.label.description: Front page Stats label for docket entries count

home.stats.accessTiers.label.description: Front page Stats label for access tiers count

home.spotlight.description.message: Describe the rules. Marshal files the paperwork.
home.spotlight.description.description: Front page Spotlight description paragraph below the code snippet

home.appMarket.label.message: Review your docket on the go

home.blogPreview.description.message: Policies filed, dockets stamped, stewardship on the record.

showcase.featuresSix.accessTiers.descrip.message: Sponsor, contributor, public — three tiers, one queue, one clerk. The label is assigned at receipt.

showcase.spotlightCode.description.message: Three commands to go from zero to a stewarded repository.

showcase.item.spotlightText.title.description: Showcase item title for Spotlight (with text variant)

showcase.spotlightText.description.message: Marshal reads your policy file, queues each applicable workflow at the top of the next hour, and stamps a docket entry for every action taken. The docket is append-only. Nothing closes silently.

showcase.item.blogPreviewWithDesc.title.description: Showcase item title for BlogPreview (with description variant)

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.description.message: Policies filed, dockets stamped, stewardship on the record.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post1.descr.message: Some incoming work does not fit any policy. A misfiled bug, a request from outside the tier system, a duplicate of a duplicate. Marshal files them under unclassified.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post2.title.message: One year of stale threads, archived in a single afternoon

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post2.descr.message: The repository had 2,184 issues older than a year. Marshal closed and sealed 2,108 in a single overnight pass.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post3.title.message: Three tiers of support, one queue, one clerk

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post3.descr.message: Marshal now routes incoming support tickets by access tier into a single queue with three labels. The label is stamped, not negotiated.

showcase.item.blogPreviewNoDesc.title.description: Showcase item title for BlogPreview (no description variant)

showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.title.message: Marshal 2.4: Auditor Auto-fix Tiers and Clerk Dependency Graphs
showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.title.description: Showcase BlogPreview (no description) sample post title

showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.descrip.message: Auditor now applies automatic fixes across the conventions and formatting tiers, and Clerk renders a dependency graph across all dockets in the workspace.
showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.descrip.description: Showcase BlogPreview (no description) sample post description

theme.navbar.closeMenuAriaLabel.description: The ARIA label for the button that closes the mobile navigation menu

theme.navbar.moreLabel.description: The screen-reader label for the navbar overflow More dropdown trigger

theme.NotFound.bundles.0.title.message: This page took a wrong turn.

theme.NotFound.bundles.0.description.message: Let us get you back on the right path.

theme.NotFound.bundles.0.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 1 of 5 — CTA label (wrong-turn voice)

theme.NotFound.bundles.1.title.message: This URL is not on our map.

theme.NotFound.bundles.1.description.message: It might have moved, or perhaps it never existed at all.

theme.NotFound.bundles.1.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 2 of 5 — CTA label (cartographic voice)

theme.NotFound.bundles.2.title.message: Looks like we lost the trail.

theme.NotFound.bundles.2.description.message: Try heading back to camp or use the search to find your way.

theme.NotFound.bundles.2.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 3 of 5 — CTA label (lost-traveler voice)

theme.NotFound.bundles.3.description.message: If something brought you here, the link is probably out of date.

theme.NotFound.bundles.3.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 4 of 5 — CTA label (vacant-address voice)

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.title.message: We could not find what you were looking for.

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.description.message: Double-check the URL for typos, or head back to start fresh.

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 5 of 5 — CTA label (apologetic voice)

theme.blog.authorsList.pageTitle.description: The title of the authors page

theme.docs.sidebar.expandButtonAriaLabel.description: The ARIA label for the button that expands the doc sidebar

theme.docs.sidebar.collapseButtonAriaLab.description: The ARIA label for the button that collapses the doc sidebar

theme.blog.post.plurals.description: Pluralized label for "{count} posts". Use as much plural forms (separated by "|") as your language support (see https://www.unicode.org/cldr/cldr-aux/charts/34/supplemental/language_plural_rules.html)

theme.blog.tagTitle.description: The title of the page for a blog tag

theme.blog.author.pageTitle.description: The title of the page for a blog author

theme.blog.authorsList.viewAll.description: The label of the link targeting the blog authors page

theme.blog.author.noPosts.message: This author has not written any posts yet.
theme.blog.author.noPosts.description: The text for authors with 0 blog post

theme.common.skipToMainContent.description: The skip to content label used for accessibility, allowing to rapidly navigate to main content with keyboard tab/enter navigation

theme.tags.tagsPageTitle.description: The title of the tag list page

theme.footer.copyright.description: Footer copyright text. The {copyright} placeholder receives the consumer's themeConfig.footer.copyright value as the source-locale fallback; per-locale overrides in i18n code.json usually inline their own text.
